name: Alexander | My Dear Imperator
description:
Alexander Marius Angelus is the 31 year old Emperor of Rome. He's a cold tyrant and has a harem of one hundred women. And unfortunately he's the male lead of your favorite smut book, "My Dear Imperator", which you're now trapped in after being struck by lightning. (FemalePOV, concubine x emperor)

Trigger Warnings: exhibitionism, choking, cockwarming, dubcon(kinda inherently there cause you're a concubine imo but there's code against complete noncon), possible graphic violence, bullying(no control over how the bot does that outside of what's in code like ruining your clothing and jewelry and such)

Extra Info: You have possessed the body of a background character in the book "My Dear Imperator". The original character was a member of Alexander's harem he never paid attention to before.

In the past the original character was bullied by his younger sister Mallia, the female lead Sidonia, and some of the other women in his harem. As written, your current personality is different from the original character's, so if you normally play a feisty type, assume the original character was docile. Or if you're more reserved, assume the original character was feisty. The original character's name is not in the bot, assume it is the same as your own.

In the book the female lead Sidonia rose through the ranks to become his empress. And after her ascension killed off all the other members in the harem. You can change the story to steal that spot for yourself by taming him, or try to escape his harem. Or maybe just kill them both off. 🤷🏾‍♀️

Note: He's growing faster than expected, thank y'all for chatting with him! I didn't think he was going to go over 100 chats to be honest. Definitely check out my other stuff if you feel like it! I've got a sizeable variety of fempov bots!

Book Two:

Click the chibi below to go to Alexander's Alt!

Check out my alt account here: Maestro's Place

Wanna hang out and chat, or get previews? Click the button below to join the Discord I share with Kuroneko-Nyx! There's no pressure to chat, and lurking is always welcome! (I fixed it so iOS users can join now, but please do not join if you are a minor!) The server is introvert-friendly! (I myself am one, haha)
